message:
Render screenshot lightbox via Portal to escape parent stacking contexts

The screenshot gallery lightbox (fixed overlay at z-[100]) was rendered
inside the component tree which lives inside FrankenContainer elements
that apply CSS transforms (via framer-motion) and filter effects. Both
transform and filter create new stacking contexts in CSS, which means
a child's z-index — even z-[100] — is trapped within the parent's
paint layer and cannot overlay elements outside that subtree.

Fix: Add a Portal helper (same createPortal-to-document.body pattern
already used in BottomSheet and the beads detail modal) and wrap the
entire AnimatePresence lightbox block in it. The lightbox now renders
as a direct child of <body>, completely escaping any ancestor stacking
contexts.

Also bump z-index from z-[100] to z-[999] for consistency with the
other Portal-based overlays (BottomSheet uses z-[999], beads modal
uses z-[9999]).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
